author: Ayush Ozha
name: Non-record H200 screening: stabilized phased TTT LR retune
reason_not_record: Available evidence was produced on 1xH200; training and full TTT evaluation do not satisfy the official 10-minute 8xH100 record requirement, and 3-seed official validation is still pending.
change_summary: Retune phased test-time-training LoRA learning rate from 1e-4 to 7e-5 while keeping the accepted top-stack architecture, tokenizer, dataset transform, compression path, and TTT schedule unchanged.
hardware: 1xNVIDIA H200 for screening; official 8xH100 validation queued

h200_full_ttt_lr7e5.velda_status: TASK_STATUS_FAILURE due to log-stream/RPC issue despite completed score line in log
